description: You are a Web Developer tasked with implementing cross-domain tracking for a campaign funnel. Two pages are hosted on a local development server (port 8080): a Landing Page (http://localhost:8080/landing.html) and a Shop Page (http://127.0.0.1:8080/shop.html). Currently, 'localhost' and '127.0.0.1' are treated as different origins, causing Matomo to record separate visitors and breaking campaign attribution. Enable Cross-Domain Linking in the Matomo tracking snippets within /home/ga/sites/landing.html and /home/ga/sites/shop.html to ensure a single Visitor ID is maintained across both domains. Matomo is running at http://localhost/.
